answers: Adobe After Effects is a motion graphics and visual effects software. It's used for creating animations, title sequences, compositing, and adding VFX to video projects.
After Effects holo motion graphics ar VFX er jonno — text animation, logo reveal, particle effects, green screen compositing shob kora jay. Video editing er por e use hoy usually.
After Effects is for animation and effects, while Premiere Pro is for video editing. Many professionals use both — edit in Premiere, then send clips to AE for effects and motion graphics.

To learn After Effects, start with keyframe animation, masks, and basic expressions. Understanding layers and compositions is essential. YouTube channels like School of Motion and Video Copilot are excellent resources.
